capabilities.title: Roof-attached wall top profile
commandSurface: roof geometry with sampled upper profile
rendererSurface: wall mesh generation samples the roof plane along the wall length
advisorCoverage: visual gate still required for endpoint-only sampling regressions
knownFailureModes: wall remains a rectangle when roof attachment is not rendered
gable edge samples only endpoints and misses the ridge
roof/wall seam or z-fighting visible in shaded view
requiredEvidence: front or side elevation screenshot showing sloped/gable wall top
wire/transparent diagnostic view for roof-wall seams
advisor warning JSON with no roof/wall host warnings
capabilities.fallback: Create an engine/render task; do not hide the rectangular wall with a mass placeholder.

capabilities.title: Embedded roof opening with occupied terrace
rendererSurface: roof opening must subtract from roof mesh
terrace must render as an occupied void rather than a skylight
advisorCoverage: room_no_door for terrace access when modelled as a room
roof/opening warnings tied to visible sketch features
knownFailureModes: opening exists only as metadata and roof remains visually continuous
terrace reads as a flat skylight slot instead of an occupied balcony
guard rail floats above or crosses the roof surface
no door connects the upper floor to the terrace
requiredEvidence: high roof screenshot proving a real cutout
side screenshot showing terrace depth and return faces
advisor warning JSON with no opening-host or terrace-access blockers
capabilities.fallback: Represent the terrace with explicit roof void, floor, return walls, and access before adding detail; if subtraction fails, stop and file a renderer capability gap.

capabilities.title: Recessed upper loggia / covered balcony
rendererSurface: visible setback, returns, rail, and rear facade plane
knownFailureModes: flat balcony is stuck onto facade instead of being recessed
rail hides the facade rhythm
room boundary remains open behind the loggia
requiredEvidence: main/front screenshot showing depth of the recess
plan screenshot showing the setback and access
advisor warning JSON with no room boundary/access blockers
capabilities.fallback: Model the recess as real set-back walls and returns before rail/glazing detail.

capabilities.title: Folded white upper wrapper shell
rendererSurface: walls, roof, and fascia must read as one thick white architectural wrapper
advisorCoverage: mass-placeholder and roof/wall seam checks are not fully automated
knownFailureModes: generic roof-on-box silhouette
translucent mass placeholders left in final model
thin disconnected roof instead of thick folded frame
requiredEvidence: main sketch-matched screenshot
side screenshot showing upper/lower volume hierarchy
wire diagnostic screenshot without mass placeholders in final envelope
capabilities.fallback: Use explicit walls/roof/fascia; any mass is temporary study geometry only.

capabilities.title: Vertical cladding zones
rendererSurface: material texture or explicit strips must show vertical rhythm
advisorCoverage: visual gate required for false batten artifacts
knownFailureModes: flat material reads as plain wall
battens detach or cross openings
cladding zone starts/stops at the wrong volume
requiredEvidence: front and side screenshots showing cladding on ground/base zones
artifact check for strips crossing doors/windows
capabilities.fallback: Prefer clean material intent over noisy fake strips if the renderer cannot support reliable boards.

capabilities.title: Usable rooms, doors, stairs, and boundaries
rendererSurface: plan and wire diagnostic views expose topology and collisions
knownFailureModes: room-separation rectangles hide real enclosure faults
stair runs into exterior wall or blocks a door
occupied rooms have no valid door
toy-scale room programme
requiredEvidence: ground plan screenshot
upper plan screenshot
advisor warning JSON with zero room/stair blockers
capabilities.fallback: Redesign the room layout with real walls and plausible stair clearances; do not patch with universal room-separation lines.

capabilities.title: Saved views and evidence packet
rendererSurface: required views must render non-blank and fit the whole feature
knownFailureModes: screenshots prove only one flattering angle
plan camera is zoomed to the wrong region
advisor info warnings are ignored even when they explain visible faults
requiredEvidence: advisor-warning.json
advisor-info.json
visual-checklist.json
status.md
capabilities.fallback: Stop acceptance until the missing view or advisor artifact is produced.
